description: refugee camp in Tak Province, Thailand
description_wiki: Mae La, alternatively spelled Maela (Thai: แม่หละ), or Beh Klaw (S'gaw Karen: မဲၣ်လးဒဲကဝီၤ, ဘဲကျီး), is a refugee camp in Thailand.

aliases: Krungthepmahanakhon Amonrattanakosin Mahintharayutthaya Mahadilokphop Noppharatratchathaniburirom Udomratchaniwetmahasathan Amonphimanawatansathit Sakkathattiyawitsanukamprasit
description_wiki: Bangkok, officially known in Thai as Krung Thep Maha Nakhon and colloquially as Krung Thep, is the capital and most populous city of Thailand.

aliases: Saint Paul, Ramsey, Minnesota, United States
description: capital of the state of Minnesota, United States; county seat of Ramsey County, Minnesota

description_wiki: Mae Sot (Northern Thai: ᨾᩯ᩵ᩈᩬᨯ; Thai: แม่สอด, pronounced [mɛ̂ː sɔ̀ːt]; Burmese: မဲဆောက်, [mɛ́ sʰaʊʔ]; Shan: မႄႈသွတ်ႇ, [mɛ sʰɔt̚]) is a city in western Thailand that shares a border with Myanmar to the west.
